character_dossiers.name: Captain Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: Organized the group into watches, kept spirits up, and assisted with tasks.

character_dossiers.name: the doctor
character_dossiers.biography: Served as cook, had a bandaged face from an injury, and engaged in conversations with the narrator.

character_dossiers.name: Gray
character_dossiers.biography: Had a bandaged face from an injury sustained while escaping mutineers.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: Assigned to labor duties alongside Hunter and Joyce.

character_dossiers.name: Hunter
character_dossiers.biography: Assigned to labor duties alongside the squire and Joyce.

character_dossiers.name: Joyce
character_dossiers.biography: Assigned to labor duties alongside the squire and Hunter.

character_dossiers.name: Tom Redruth
character_dossiers.biography: Unburied, stiff, and placed under the Union Jack near the stockade.

character_dossiers.name: Ben Gunn
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned as a man with a cheese preference, discussed by the doctor regarding his sanity.
